# Costa Driver

> Ultra-premium private chauffeur and concierge transfer service on the French and Italian Riviera. Based in Mouans-Sartoux (Alpes-Maritimes, France). Available 24/7. Multilingual team (French, English, Italian, Russian). 67 Google reviews, rated 5.0/5.

## About

Costa Driver provides exclusive private chauffeur services between the most prestigious addresses on the French and Italian Riviera. The service covers airport transfers, private excursions, corporate travel, events, weddings, and multi-day itineraries. All vehicles are Mercedes-Benz (E-Class, S-Class, V-Class) and Range Rover. Drivers are discreet, professionally trained, and locally expert.

- Telephone: +33 7 67 82 17 15
- Email: contact@costadriver.fr
- Address: 75 Chemin des Groulles, 06370 Mouans-Sartoux, France
- Google Maps: https://share.google/DaoKtu8rUORm5ZAAQ
- Languages: French, English, Italian, Russian, Spanish

## Destinations Served

- Monaco: Grand Prix, casino transfers, yacht port pickups
- Cannes: Film Festival, Palais des Festivals, hotel transfers
- Nice: Côte d'Azur Airport (NCE) pickups and drop-offs
- Saint-Tropez: Port Grimaud, beach clubs, private villas
- Portofino (Italy): day trips and multi-day itineraries
- Cinque Terre (Italy): private access to the five villages
- Milano (Italy): Malpensa Airport, fashion week, business travel
- Geneva (Switzerland): GVA Airport, private banking, CERN
- Les Deux-Alpes: ski season alpine transfers

## Services

- Private Transfers: airport, hotel, port, door-to-door
- Private Excursions: custom full-day and half-day trips
- Luxury Concierge: restaurant reservations, event access, local expertise
- Events & Occasions: corporate events, celebrations, VIP coordination
- Destination Weddings: full wedding-day ground transportation

## Fleet

- Mercedes-Benz E-Class (Berline) — up to 3 passengers
- Mercedes-Benz S-Class (Berline Luxe) — up to 3 passengers
- Mercedes-Benz V-Class (VAN) — up to 7 passengers
- Range Rover Evoque (SUV) — up to 4 passengers

## Pricing & Booking

Pricing is bespoke and provided on request. No standardised fares — all journeys are quoted individually based on distance, duration, vehicle, and services required. Inquiries are answered personally within one hour. Booking via contact form, WhatsApp (+33 7 67 82 17 15), or email.
